zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Talmasche於1175年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字時，他的父親Richard De Talemasche26歲，母親Avicia Taillard-2歲。他於1198年與Mary Talmasche在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1225年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Talmasche was born in 1175, in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard De Talemasche, was 26 and his mother, Avicia Taillard, was -2. He married Mary Talmasche in 1198, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1225, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Talmasche(이)가 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토크 탤마지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Talemasche(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia Taillard(은)는 -2세였다. 그는 1198년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Mary Talmasche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1225년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
